task_completion.description: Generate polars for Clark-Y and NACA 4412 airfoils at Re=300,000 with 360-degree extrapolation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade interface showing both Clark-Y and NACA 4412 airfoils loaded, with polar analysis settings or results indicating Reynolds number 300,000, Ncrit=9, and 360-degree polar extrapolation.

task_completion.description: Design two 3-bladed rotors optimized for TSR=6 using the Schmitz method.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rotor design module in QBlade displaying two distinct rotors (one for each airfoil). The parameters should show 3 blades, a radius of 1.5m, a hub radius of 0.1m, and optimization for TSR=6.

task_completion.description: Perform a BEM simulation for both rotors at 8 m/s wind speed over a TSR range of 3 to 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rotor BEM Simulation module showing simulation setup or results (like a Cp vs TSR graph) for both rotors, with wind speed set to 8 m/s and the X-axis (TSR) ranging from 3 to 10.

task_completion.description: Save the QBlade project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QBlade window title bar showing 'airfoil_comparison.wpa' or a file explorer window showing the saved .wpa file in the /home/ga/Documents/projects/ directory.

task_completion.description: Create a text report documenting the maximum Cp for each airfoil and identifying the superior one.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing 'airfoil_selection_report.txt' containing maximum Cp values for both rotors (expected between 0.35 and 0.55) and explicitly stating that NACA 4412 is the superior airfoil.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the QBlade GUI to perform the simulations rather than faking the output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QBlade application open with the relevant modules (XFOIL Direct Analysis, HAWT Rotor Design, Rotor BEM Simulation) being actively used.

integrity.description: Verify the report contains specific Cp values derived from the simulation graphs.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Cp values written in the text report should match the peaks of the Cp vs TSR curves visible in the QBlade BEM simulation screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just use terminal commands to echo text into the report without running the comparative study.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of intermediate QBlade simulation screenshots showing the actual performance difference before the report is written.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected superior airfoil is NACA 4412. The maximum Cp (power coefficient) for the rotors should fall within the range of 0.35 to 0.55 (specifically around 0.45-0.52 for NACA 4412 at these conditions). The project must be a valid QBlade project file (.wpa). Design parameters to verify in the UI: TSR=6, Radius=1.5m, Hub=0.1m, Re=300,000, and wind speed=8 m/s.
